raw_consumer_statement: There are several charges on my AMEX account totaling {$4300.00} from some company called XXXX. AMEX has confirmed that the merchant can not identify my name, email, company name, or mailing address. In fact, AMEX admits that the merchant only has a publicly listed po box . That hardly confirms that I ever gave my card number to the merchant. I have repeatedly asked AMEX to remove these charges. When I called AMEX to dispute the charge, AMEX discriminated against me. I have called XXXX XXXX, the General Counsel for AMEX and have not yet heard back from her. This has nothing to do with the improper charge on my AMEX account.
